nasb.text: Also whoever touches the person with the discharge shall wash his clothes and bathe in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: And whoever touches the body of the one with the discharge shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 觸摸了有異常排泄的人的身體，就要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 凡碰到他的人都不洁净，必须洗衣、沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
